title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese outlines three rules and six moves for successfully building projects with Claude Code, framing the guidance around leadership and project selection before starting development. The advice is grounded in startup experience and Y Combinator principles.
